sections.heading: Project overview
sections.body: NexusPoint is stepping in as ScaleLogix AIs embedded delivery partner for AI automation. You sell AI-driven workflows to SMB clients (HVAC, real estate, legal, medical) and the bottleneck is building and handing them off fast enough. We own the build-to-handoff pipeline: production-grade automations in Make.com, n8n, and Zapier; AI integrations via OpenAI and Claude APIs; CRM setup in GoHighLevel and HubSpot; and live client-facing calls so your customers actually understand what we build. Goal is 3-4 client automation projects shipped per month at steady state.

sections.heading: Scope summary
bullets: Full-stack automation builds in Make.com, n8n, and Zapier (lead nurture, appointment booking, CRM-triggered follow-ups, AI intake systems)
AI integration and prompt engineering using OpenAI API, Claude API, and Voiceflow
CRM configuration and pipeline automation in GoHighLevel and HubSpot
Client-facing delivery: Zoom onboarding calls, workflow walkthroughs, plain-language explanations for non-technical owners
Workflow documentation library: architecture diagrams, usage guides, Loom video walkthroughs for every build
Reusable template vault: every workflow templatized for redeployment on future similar clients
Proactive monthly optimization reports on live automations

rows: Onboarding: tool access, system review, first client assignment
First Delivery Cycle: 2-3 automations built, tested, and presented to ScaleLogix AI
Steady State: 3-4 client projects per month, ongoing delivery
Template Compounding: reusable templates reduce build time by 40%+

sections.heading: Communication
bullets: Primary channel: WhatsApp for async updates, email for formal project handoffs
Weekly check-in: Friday async update covering projects shipped, in-flight work, and any blockers
Response time: within 24 hours on weekdays
Point of contact: Aleem (NexusPoint) for all project and delivery questions

sections.heading: What we need from you
bullets: Access to your Make.com or n8n account (read-only is fine to start)
Access to GoHighLevel or HubSpot so we can review your current CRM setup
Your first client assignment: client name, industry, what they need automated, and any tools or data already in place
A brief on how you currently scope and hand off projects to clients, so we fit into your existing flow without disruption

sections.heading: Next steps
sections.body: Kicking off with a 45-minute call this week. We will review your tool stack, confirm the first client assignment, and set the rhythm for the Week 2-4 delivery cycle. From there, a Friday async update every week. The project checklist tracks every stage from now through steady-state delivery.

checklist.title: ScaleLogix AI -- Project Checklist
rows: Kickoff call (45 min): tool stack review, first client assignment, delivery flow
Map ScaleLogix AI current workflow: how projects are scoped, built, and handed off
Identify automation boundaries: what NexusPoint builds vs what ScaleLogix AI handles
Confirm access: Make.com or n8n, GoHighLevel or HubSpot, client API keys if any
Diagram target workflow for first client automation assignment
Define triggers, branches, and edge cases for first build
ScaleLogix AI review and sign-off on workflow map before build starts
Build lead nurture or appointment booking automation in Make.com or n8n
Wire integrations and credentials for first client (CRM, email, calendar APIs)
AI layer: OpenAI or Claude API prompt architecture for intelligent routing or intake
Add error handling, notifications, and retry logic
Add logging for visibility into automation runs
Dry run tests with sample data across all branches
Live test with low-volume real data from first client
ScaleLogix AI UAT: walkthrough call with Jordan to review before client handoff
Loom walkthrough video of how the workflow runs (for the end client)
Documentation: architecture diagram, credentials map, retry logic notes
Templatize workflow for reuse on similar future clients
Monthly optimization report on live automations

email.subject: Welcome to NexusPoint, ScaleLogix AI kickoff
email.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for the trust on the embedded delivery partnership. The client delivery bottleneck you described is exactly what this engagement is built to solve.

Everything for the project lives here:

- Project folder: [FOLDER_URL]
- Onboarding doc: [DOC_URL]
- Project checklist: [SHEET_URL]

To get the first automation into build this week, we need three things from you:

- Access to your Make.com or n8n account (read-only to start)
- Access to GoHighLevel or HubSpot so I can review your current CRM setup
- Your first client assignment: who they are, what they need automated, and any tools or data already in place

Can you do a 45-minute kickoff call this week? I am free Wednesday or Thursday afternoon, Pakistan Standard Time (UTC+5). Or send me a time that works on your end.

Let us get the first build shipped before end of next week.

Aleem
